_publications._publicationTitle: Selumetinib normalizes Ras/MAPK signaling in clinically relevant neurofibromatosis type 1 minipig tissues in vivo.

_contextSnippet: Key MAPK pathway genes DUSP6 and FOS were downregulated in skin, sciatic nerve, optic nerve, and cerebral cortex of all treated minipigs, illustrating target engagement in those tissues
details: Successfully measured DUSP6 and FOS mRNA expression changes showing downregulation in all treated minipig tissues, demonstrating target engagement
